title: Key Derivation, HKDF, and Key Separation · Execution Trace: Crypto Go Hkdf Extract Expand
summary: A protocol slices one shared secret into keys, uses user passwords as HKDF input, omits transcript context, and changes output length without versioning. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the hkdf extract expand increment in labeled key schedule and derivation tree. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Apply HKDF extract and expand with supported hashes, salt, labeled info, bounded output, and one-way key schedule ownership.
Distinguish extraction, expansion, password stretching, entropy concentration limits, and deterministic key schedules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Hkdf Extract Expand · Theory Crypto Go Hkdf Extract Expand
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 3715 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive bounded purpose- and role-separated HKDF keys bound to the negotiated transcript; retain exact canonical bytes, purpose, role, version, and artifact identity; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
